102.27: And you are as you are, and your years do not end.
102.28: And the sons of your Servants will dwell in the Earth and their seed will be established before you.” Ps

103.1: Bless LORD JEHOVAH, my soul, and all my bones, bless his holy name!
103.2: Bless, LORD JEHOVAH, my soul, and do not forget all his rewards,
103.3: Who forgives you all your evil and heals all your diseases.
103.4: He saves you from destruction; he supports you with grace and with compassions.
103.5: He satisfies your body with precious things; your youth is renewed like the eagle.
103.6: LORD JEHOVAH performs righteousness and judgment to all the oppressed.
103.7: He shows his way to Moses and his works to the sons of Israel.
103.8: LORD JEHOVAH is compassionate and cherishing; he is patient and his grace is abundant.
103.9: Because he does not harbor ill will to eternity and will not keep his wrath to eternity.
103.10: For he has not done to us according to our sins, neither has he rewarded us according to our evil.
103.11: Because as Heaven is higher than the Earth, so has the grace of LORD JEHOVAH prevailed upon his worshipers.
103.12: And as the East is far from the West so will our evil be far from us!
103.13: And as a father shows compassion upon children, LORD JEHOVAH shows compassion upon his worshipers.
103.14: Because he knows our form; he remembers that we are dust.
103.15: A son of man is like the grass in its days and like a flower of the field so he springs up.
103.16: For when the wind has blown upon it, it is not, neither is his place known.
103.17: The grace of LORD JEHOVAH is from eternity and unto eternity upon his worshipers and his righteousness to their children's children
103.18: To those who keep his covenant and remember his commandments and do them.
103.19: LORD JEHOVAH establishes his throne in Heaven and his Kingdom is authorized over all.
103.20: Bless LORD JEHOVAH, his Angels, who are Masters in power, doing his commandments.
103.21: Bless LORD JEHOVAH, all his hosts, and his Servants who do his will.
103.22: Bless LORD JEHOVAH, all his Servants who are in all the Earth of his dominion. Bless LORD JEHOVAH, oh my soul!

104.1: Bless LORD JEHOVAH, my soul! LORD JEHOVAH my God is very great; he wears brightness and glory!
104.2: He is covered in light like a cloak. He has stretched out Heaven like a curtain.
104.3: He makes his lofty dwellings in the waters and sets his chariot above the clouds and walks upon the wings of the wind.
104.4: He makes his Angels the wind and his ministers burning fire.
104.5: He has prepared Earth upon its foundations that it will not move for an eternity of eternities.
104.6: The deep was like a cloak for its covering and above the mountains the waters rose up.
104.7: From your rebuke they flee and they hasten from the voice of your thunders.
104.8: They went up the mountains and they came down the valleys into the place which you prepared for them.
104.9: You have set borders for them which they will not cross and cover the earth.
104.10: You have sent the springs into the valleys and they walk among the mountains.
104.11: And they give drink to all the animals of the wilderness and satisfy wild donkeys that thirst.
104.12: And the birds of the sky alight upon them; from among the mountains they give a sound.
104.13: He waters the mountains from his lofty dwellings; from the fruit of your works you will satisfy the Earth.
104.14: He makes grass to sprout for the beasts and green plants for the service of man to bring forth bread from the Earth.
104.15: Wine gladdens the heart of the son of man and brightens his face with oil; bread sustains the heart of the son of man.
104.16: The trees of LORD JEHOVAH will be satisfied and the cedars of Lebanon that he has planted.
104.17: There the fowl have made a nest and the stork nests itself in the cypress.
104.18: The high mountains for the mountain goats and the crags are a refuge for the rabbits.
104.19: He made the moon for times and the sun knows the time of its settings.
104.20: He made the darkness and there was night and in it pass through all the wild beasts of the forest.
104.21: The lionesses roar to tear apart and to seek their food from God.
104.22: The rising of the sun they are gathered and they lie down in their dwellings.
104.23: A son of man goes forth to his work and for his service until the evening.
104.24: How many are your works LORD JEHOVAH, and you have made them all in wisdom, and you have filled the earth with your possessions!
104.25: This is the great sea and an expanse round about in which are swarming things without number, great creatures with the small.
104.26: In it the ships travel; this is Leviathan which you have created to be merry in it.
104.27: All are waiting for you to give them food in their times.
104.28: You give to them and they are fed; you open your hand and they are satisfied.
104.29: You turn your face and they are disturbed; you take their spirit and they die and return to their dust.
104.30: You send your Spirit and they are created and you renew the face of the earth.
104.31: The glory of LORD JEHOVAH shall be for eternity! LORD JEHOVAH will rejoice in his works.
104.32: For he looks at the earth and it quakes and he rebukes the mountains and they smoke!
104.33: I shall praise LORD JEHOVAH with my life and I shall sing praise to my God as long as I endure.
104.34: My praise will delight him I shall rejoice in LORD JEHOVAH!
104.35: Sinners will cease from the earth and the evil will not be seen in it. Bless LORD JEHOVAH, my soul!

105.1: Give thanks to LORD JEHOVAH and call his Name and show his works among the nations!
105.2: Praise him and sing to him and declare all his wonders!
105.3: Praise The Name of his Holiness! The heart of those who seek LORD JEHOVAH will rejoice!
105.4: Seek LORD JEHOVAH and be strengthened. Seek his face always!
105.5: Remember his wonders that he made; his wonders and the judgment of his mouth!
105.6: The seed of Abraham his Servant, and the children of Jacob, his Elect Ones.
105.7: He is LORD JEHOVAH, our God, whose judgments are in all the earth!
105.8: He remembers his covenant for eternity, the word that he commanded to a thousand generations
105.9: Who established his covenant with Abraham and his oaths with Isaac.
105.10: And he establishes his testimony with Jacob to Israel for eternity.
105.11: And he said, "I shall give to you the land of Canaan, the lines of their inheritance”
105.12: When they were few in number; they were small, and they were inhabitants in it.
105.13: They walked from nation to nation and from a kingdom to another people.
105.14: And he allowed no man to do them wrong; he rebuked Kings for their sakes.
105.15: You shall not touch my Anointed and you shall not harm my Prophets.
105.16: And he called a famine upon the land and he broke all the stalks of their grain.
105.17: He sent a man before them. Joseph was sold to slavery.
105.18: And they bound his feet in shackles and he himself was put in irons.
105.19: Until his word was proven, the speech of LORD JEHOVAH tried him.
105.20: The King sent and released him; he made him a Prince over his people,
105.21: Lord over his house and Ruler over all his possessions,
105.22: That he would instruct Rulers as he pleased and would teach wisdom to the Elders.
105.23: Israel entered Egypt and Jacob dwelt in the habitation of Ham.
105.24: He multiplied his people well and strengthened him more than his enemies.
105.25: And they turned back their hearts to hate his people and to deal treacherously against his Servants.
105.26: He sent Moses his Servant and Aaron whom he chose.
105.27: He performed his signs among them and his wonders in the land of Ham.
105.28: He sent darkness and it became dark and they bitterly provoked his Word.
105.29: He turned their waters to blood and killed their fish.
105.30: Frogs swarmed in their land and in the inner chambers of their Kings.
105.31: He spoke and there was a swarm of insects and lice in all their borders.
105.32: He made their rain hail and fire burned in their land.
105.33: He struck their vines and their fig trees and shattered the trees of their borders.
105.34: He spoke and the locusts came and the crawling locust without number in all their land.
105.35: It ate all the grass and fruit of their lands.
105.36: He killed all the firstborn of Egypt, the first of all their offspring.
105.37: He brought them out with silver and with gold and there was no one who was weak among their generations.
105.38: Egypt was glad at their exodus because their fear had fallen upon them.
105.39: He spread a cloud before them and it shaded them, and fire to give light in the night.
105.40: They asked and he brought them food and the bread of Heaven filled them.
105.41: He opened the flint and the waters flowed and the waters walked in the thirsty place.
105.42: Because he had remembered the word of his Holiness of Abraham his Servant,
105.43: He brought his people out with joy and his young men with praise.
105.44: He gave them the lands of the Gentiles and they inherited the toil of the peoples
105.45: That they would heed his commandments and keep his laws.

106.1: Give thanks to LORD JEHOVAH, because he is good, and his grace is to eternity.
106.2: Who will tell the wonders of LORD JEHOVAH and will proclaim all his praises?
106.3: Blessed are they who keep his judgments and do his righteousness at all times.
106.4: Remember me, LORD JEHOVAH, with the pleasure of your people, and save me in your salvation!
106.5: That I may see the good of your chosen ones, I shall rejoice in your joy and I shall be glorified in your inheritance!
106.6: We have sinned with our fathers; we have gone astray and we have done wickedness.
106.7: Our fathers in Egypt did not understand your wonders and they did not remember the multitude of your graces when they contended by the waters at the Sea of Reeds.
106.8: He saved them because of his Name to show his manliness.
106.9: He rebuked The Sea of Reeds and it dried up; he walked them into the deep as into the wilderness.
106.10: He saved them from the hand of the enemy and delivered them from the hand of the oppressor.
106.11: Waters covered their oppressors and not one of them remained.
106.12: They believed his words and sang his praises.
106.13: They made haste and they forgot God and did not trust his counsel.
106.14: They lusted greatly in the wilderness and they tempted God in the desert.
106.15: He gave them their requests and sent fullness to their souls.
106.16: They were envious of Moses in the camp and of Aaron, the Holy One of LORD JEHOVAH.
106.17: The Earth opened and swallowed Dathan and buried over the assembly of Abiram.
106.18: A fire was kindled in their assemblies and a flame burned up the evil ones.
106.19: They made a calf in Khoreeb and worshiped the molten image.
106.20: And they changed their glory into the likeness of an ox eating grass.
106.21: And they forgot God who saved them, who did great things in Egypt
106.22: And wonders in the land of Ham and awesome deeds in the Sea of Reeds.
106.23: And he said that he would destroy them if Moses, his chosen, had not stood in the gap before him, and turned back his wrath, lest he would destroy them.
106.24: They despised the land of desire and they did not believe his word,
106.25: And they complained in their tents and they did not hear the voice of LORD JEHOVAH.
106.26: And he lifted his hand against them to destroy them among the Gentiles.
106.27: And he would scatter their seed among the Gentiles and would destroy them in the lands.
106.28: For they joined themselves to the idols of Peor and they ate the sacrifices of the dead.
106.29: And they angered him by their works and made him jealous with their idols, and he strengthened the plague against them suddenly.
106.30: Phinehas stood up and prayed and the plague was restrained.
106.31: And it was accounted to him justification for a generation of generations unto eternity.
106.32: And they angered him concerning the waters of strife and he afflicted Moses because of them.
106.33: Because they bitterly provoked his spirit and they spoke by his lips.
106.34: And they did not destroy the nations of which LORD JEHOVAH had spoken to them.
106.35: But they were mixed with the Gentiles and they learned their works.
106.36: And they feared their idols and they were a stumbling block to them.
106.37: For they sacrificed their sons and their daughters to demons.
106.38: And they shed innocent blood, the blood of their sons and their daughters, whom they sacrificed to the idols of Canaan, and the land was defiled with blood.
106.39: They were defiled by their works and they committed fornication with their inventions.
106.40: And the wrath of LORD JEHOVAH was provoked upon his people and he despised his inheritance.
106.41: He gave them over into the hand of the Gentiles and their haters were authorized over them.
106.42: And their enemies subdued them and they were subject under their hands.
106.43: Many times he delivered them and they bitterly provoked him in their minds and they were humbled in their evil.
106.44: And he saw their affliction and he heard their prayer.
106.45: And he has remembered his covenant and has shown mercy upon them and has led them according to the abundance of his grace.
106.46: And he gave them affection before all their captors.
106.47: Save us, LORD JEHOVAH, our God; gather us from the nations that we may confess your holy name and we shall be glorified in your inheritance.
106.48: Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH, The God of Israel, from eternity and unto eternity; and all the people shall say, "Amen and amen"!

107.1: Give thanks to LORD JEHOVAH, because he is good, and his grace is for eternity.
107.2: The redeemed of LORD JEHOVAH will say that he saved them from the hand of the oppressor.
107.3: From all the lands he gathered them: from the East and from the West, from the North and from the Sea.
107.4: And they were lost in the wilderness of the deserts and they did not find the road of an inhabited city.
107.5: They were hungry and thirsty and their souls were agitated.
107.6: They begged of LORD JEHOVAH in their sufferings and he brought them out from their griefs.
107.7: He walked them in the way of truth to go to inhabited cities.
107.8: His righteous ones shall thank LORD JEHOVAH for his mercies upon the sons of men.
107.9: Because he satisfies the afflicted souls and he fills the hungry soul:
107.10: Those who sit in darkness and in the shadows of death, and are bound in poverty and in irons.
107.11: Because they bitterly provoked the Word of God and rejected the counsel of The Highest
107.12: He broke their heart with toil and they were sick and there was no helper for them.
107.13: And they prayed to LORD JEHOVAH in their adversity and he saved them from their adversity.
107.14: He brought them out from darkness and from the shadow of death and he cut their bonds.
107.15: His righteous ones shall confess to LORD JEHOVAH that his mercies are upon the children of men.
107.16: Because he shattered the gates of brass and has cut down the bars of iron.
107.17: He helped them from the way of their sins and they were humbled by their evils.
107.18: Their souls had hated all food and had arrived unto the gates of death.
107.19: They begged LORD JEHOVAH in their sufferings and he brought them out from their adversity.
107.20: He sent his word and he healed them and delivered them from destruction.
107.21: His righteous ones shall confess LORD JEHOVAH for his mercies upon the children of men.
107.22: Sacrifice to him sacrifices of praise; praise his works with his wonders!
107.23: Those who go down to the sea in ships and do work in the great waters
107.24: They have seen the works of LORD JEHOVAH and his wonders in the depths of the sea!
107.25: For he has raised up the wind of hurricanes and the waves of the sea were lifted up.
107.26: They went up to the sky and went down to the abyss and their soul staggered within them.
107.27: They shook and were agitated like drunkards and all their wisdom came to nothing.
107.28: They cried to LORD JEHOVAH in their sufferings and he brought them out from their adversity.
107.29: He calmed the hurricanes and they stopped and the waves of the sea were quieted.
107.30: And they rejoiced when they stopped; he led them to the haven that they had chosen.
107.31: His righteous ones shall thank LORD JEHOVAH for his mercies upon the children of men.
107.32: Praise him in the congregation of the nations and exalt him upon the seat of the Elders.
107.33: For he makes the rivers like the wilderness and the springs of water thirsty.
107.34: The land has given its fruit to a salt pit by the works of the evil ones who inhabit it.
107.35: For he makes the wilderness pools of waters and a thirsty land into springs of waters.
107.36: He makes the hungry to dwell there and they have built cities and have dwelt in them.
107.37: They sowed the fields and they planted vineyards and they ate from the fruit of their crops.
107.38: He blessed them and they multiplied greatly and he did not diminish their cattle.
107.39: And they decreased and they were humbled in the abundance of evil and of misery.
107.40: He casts evil upon Rulers and makes them wander in a trackless waste without a road.
107.41: And he strengthened the poor and he made their families like flocks.
107.42: For the righteous ones will see and will rejoice and all the evil ones will shut their jaws.
107.43: He who is wise will keep these things and will make known the mercy of LORD JEHOVAH.

108.1: My heart is ready, oh God, my heart is ready; I shall glorify and sing praise in my honor.
108.2: Awake, my harp, awake, psaltery and harp, and I shall awake in the morning.
108.3: I shall thank you among the peoples, oh God, and I shall sing praise to your Name among the peoples.
108.4: Because your kindness is great under the sky and your faithfulness unto The Heaven of Heavens.
108.5: Be lifted up above Heaven, oh God, and let your honor be above all the earth!
108.6: So that your beloved ones may be delivered, save me by your right hand and answer me.
108.7: God has spoken in his Holiness: "I shall glory and I shall divide Shechem and I shall measure the Valley of Succoth."
108.8: Gilead is mine; Menasheh is mine; Ephraim is the defender of my head; Yehuda is my King!
108.9: Moab is my wash pot. I shall cast my sandals over Edom and I shall shout over Palestine.
108.10: Who will escort me into the strong city and who will lead me unto Edom?
108.11: Behold, you are God, you have forgotten us and you do not go forth with our armies.
108.12: Give us help against our enemies, because the salvation of man is worthless.
108.13: God will confer power to us and he will tread upon our enemies!

109.1: God of my praise, do not be silent!
109.2: Because the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of the deceiver is opened against me; they have spoken with me with a false tongue.
109.3: With the voice of hatred they have contended with me for nothing.
109.4: In exchange for my love they regarded me with malice, and I have been praying for them.
109.5: They paid me evil for good and hatred for love.
109.6: Command evil against them and Satan shall stand at their right hand!
109.7: And when they are judged they will go out condemned and their prayer will be sin!
109.8: Their days will be few and whatever is kept for them others will take.
109.9: Their children shall be orphans and their wives, widows.
109.10: — Peshitta mss. omit v. 10:"Let his sons always beg and be vagabonds, and seek food out of their ruins.”
109.11: The creditor will seize upon all that they have and foreigners will weaken their power.
109.12: No one will be compassionate to them, neither will there be one to show mercy to their orphans.
109.13: Their end will be destruction, and in the following generation their name will be blotted out.
109.14: The evil of their fathers will be remembered and the sins of their mothers will not be blotted out.
109.15: But they will be before LORD JEHOVAH at all times and he will destroy their memory from the Earth.
109.16: Because they did not remember to do good and they persecuted the poor and afflicted him whose heart grieves to death.
109.17: They loved curses and they did not choose blessings.
109.18: And they wore curses like a supply of arms and they entered into them like waters and like oil into their bones.
109.19: It shall be for them like a cloak that covers them and like a belt around their waist always.
109.20: This is the work of those who regard LORD JEHOVAH as evil and of those who speak evil against my soul.
109.21: And you, LORD JEHOVAH, work with me because of your Name; because your favor is good, save me!
109.22: Because I am poor and afflicted my heart is troubled within me.
109.23: My steps have declined like the shadow and I am driven like locusts!
109.24: My knees are weakened from fasting and my flesh grows lean of fat.
109.25: And I have been a reproach to them; they saw me and they shook their heads.
109.26: Help me, LORD JEHOVAH, my God, and save me according to your kindness!
109.27: That they may know that this is of your hand and that you have done it.
109.28: They will be cursed and you will be blessed and your Servant will rejoice.
109.29: Those who have regarded me as evil will be clothed in shame and they will be covered with it like a mantle.
109.30: I shall confess LORD JEHOVAH with my mouth and I shall glorify him among many.
109.31: Because he stood at the right hand of the afflicted one to save his soul from judgment.

110.1: LORD JEHOVAH said to my Lord, "Sit at my right hand until I put your enemies as a stool for your feet.”
110.2: LORD JEHOVAH will send the scepter of power to you from Zion and he will rule over your enemies.
110.3: Your people are glorious in the day of power; in the glories of holiness from the womb, from the first, I have begotten you, Son.
110.4: LORD JEHOVAH swore and will not lie: "You are Priest to eternity in the likeness of Melchizedek.”
110.5: LORD JEHOVAH upon your right hand shattered Kings in the day of his wrath.
110.6: He will judge the nations and he will give a full supply of corpses and will cut off the heads of many in the Earth.
110.7: And he will drink from the torrent in the way, therefore his head will be lifted up.

111.1: I shall confess LORD JEHOVAH from my whole heart, among Kings who are upright in the assembly.
111.2: Great are the works of LORD JEHOVAH, and they are sought out by all who desire them.
111.3: His works are praiseworthy and great and his righteousness stands to eternity.
111.4: He gave memorial to his wonders; LORD JEHOVAH is merciful and cherishing.
111.5: He gives food to his worshipers and he remembers his covenant to eternity.
111.6: He showed power by his works to his people to give them the inheritance of the nations.
111.7: The work of his hands is truth and judgment and they stand to the eternity of eternities.
111.8: And all his commandments are sure and they are done in righteousness and in truth.
111.9: LORD JEHOVAH sent salvation to his people and he remembers his covenant to eternity; he is holy and his Name is awesome!
111.10: The beginning of wisdom is the awesomeness of LORD JEHOVAH, and his Servants have good understanding; his glory stands to eternity.

112.1: Blessed is the man who is in awe of LORD JEHOVAH and takes heed to his commandments.
112.2: His seed shall be mighty in the Earth and he will be blessed in the generation of the righteous ones.
112.3: Possessions and riches will increase in his house and his righteousness will abide for eternity.
112.4: The Light shines in the darkness to the upright and he shows love upon the righteous.
112.5: Blessed is the man who shows mercy and lends and he proclaims his words in judgment
112.6: And he will not be shaken for eternity; the remembrance for the righteous will be for eternity.
112.7: He will not be afraid of an evil report, for his heart is established trusting upon God.
112.8: And he strengthens his heart and is not afraid as he gazes upon his enemies.
112.9: He disperses and he gives to the afflicted and his righteousness stands to the eternity of eternities and his trumpet will be lifted up in praise.
112.10: And the evil one will see and will be angry and he will gnash his teeth and vanish and the desire of the wicked will be destroyed.

113.1: Praise, you Servants of LORD JEHOVAH, praise The Name of LORD JEHOVAH!
113.2: The Name of LORD JEHOVAH shall be blessed from eternity until eternity.
113.3: From the risings of the sun unto its settings, The Name of LORD JEHOVAH is great!
113.4: LORD JEHOVAH is high over all the nations and his honor is above Heaven.
113.5: Who is like LORD JEHOVAH our God, he who sits in the high place?
113.6: And he sees into the depths in Heaven and in the Earth.
113.7: He raises the afflicted from a dunghill
113.8: For he will settle him with the Rulers of the people.
113.9: He puts a sterile woman in a household and she is a cheerful mother of children!

114.1: When Israel went forth from Egypt and of the house of Jacob from a people of a foreign language,
114.2: Yehuda was his Holiness and Israel his glory!
114.3: The Sea saw him and fled and Jordan turned its backside!
114.4: The mountains skipped like stags and the hills like flocks of sheep!
114.5: What happened to you, oh Sea, that you have fled, and Jordan, that you turned your behind?
114.6: Oh mountains, that you skipped like stags and hills like flocks of sheep?
114.7: The Earth shook from before LORD JEHOVAH and from before the God of Jacob
114.8: Who turned the flint into pools of waters and solid stone into springs of waters!

115.1: Not to us, LORD JEHOVAH, not to us, but to your Name give honor, because of your kindness and because of your truth
115.2: Lest the nations say, "Where is their God?"
115.3: Our God is in Heaven and he has done all that he pleased.
115.4: The idols of the nations are silver and gold, the work of the hands of man.
115.5: They have a mouth and they do not speak; they have eyes and they do not see.
115.6: They have ears and they do not hear; they have noses and they do not smell.
115.7: They do not feel with their hands neither do they walk with their feet and they do not speak with their throats.
115.8: Their makers shall be like them and all who trust upon them.
115.9: For the House of Israel trusts upon LORD JEHOVAH; he is their helper and their support!
115.10: For the House of Aaron trusts upon LORD JEHOVAH; he is their helper and their support!
115.11: The worshipers of LORD JEHOVAH trust upon LORD JEHOVAH; he is their helper and their support!
115.12: LORD JEHOVAH has remembered us and has blessed us; he will bless the house of Israel; he will bless the house of Aaron!
115.13: His worshipers will bless LORD JEHOVAH, the small with the great!
115.14: LORD JEHOVAH will add to you, to you and to your children!
115.15: You are blessed by LORD JEHOVAH, he who made Heaven and Earth!
115.16: The Heaven of Heavens is LORD JEHOVAH's and the Earth he has given to the children of men.
115.17: The dead will not praise LORD JEHOVAH, neither any who descend into the darkness.
115.18: But we will bless LORD JEHOVAH from now and unto eternity!

116.1: I have loved LORD JEHOVAH who will hear the voice of my prayer.
116.2: And he will incline his ear to me in the day when I shall call him.
116.3: Because the pains of death surrounded me and the afflictions of Sheol had arrived, I had found misery and affliction.
116.4: I called The Name of LORD JEHOVAH; oh, LORD JEHOVAH, save my soul!
116.5: You are merciful, LORD JEHOVAH, and righteous, and oh, God, you are compassionate!
116.6: He keeps the young children. LORD JEHOVAH humbled me and he saved me.
116.7: Return, my soul, to your rest, because of LORD JEHOVAH.
116.8: Because you have saved my soul from death and my feet from dislocations.
116.9: I shall be pleasing before you, oh, God, in the land of the living.
116.10: I have believed and I have spoken, and I have been very humbled.
116.11: I have said in my agitation, "Every man is false!"
116.12: What shall I pay LORD JEHOVAH for all his rewards unto me?
116.13: I shall take the cup of salvation and I shall call upon The Name of LORD JEHOVAH.
116.14: I shall pay my vows to LORD JEHOVAH before all the people!
116.15: Precious in the eyes of LORD JEHOVAH is the death of his righteous people!
116.16: Oh, LORD JEHOVAH, I am your Servant; I am your Servant, the son of your Maid Servant! You have taken off my shackles from me!
116.17: I shall offer you sacrifices of praise and I shall call on The Name of LORD JEHOVAH.
116.18: I shall pay my vows to LORD JEHOVAH before all his people
116.19: In the court of the House of LORD JEHOVAH and within you, oh Jerusalem!

117.1: Praise LORD JEHOVAH, all you nations; praise him all peoples
117.2: Because his grace has prevailed over us! Truly, LORD JEHOVAH is to eternity!

118.1: Give thanks to LORD JEHOVAH, because he is good, and his mercies are to eternity!
118.2: Let Israel say, "His mercies are to eternity!"
118.3: Let the House of Aaron say, "His mercies are to eternity!"
118.4: Let the worshipers of LORD JEHOVAH say, "His mercies are to eternity!"
118.5: I cried out of trouble to LORD JEHOVAH and LORD JEHOVAH answered me in a large place.
118.6: LORD JEHOVAH is my helper; I shall not fear what a son of man does to me.
118.7: LORD JEHOVAH is my helper and I shall gaze upon those who hate me.
118.8: It is good to trust upon LORD JEHOVAH: better than to trust upon man.
118.9: It is good to trust upon LORD JEHOVAH: better than to trust upon a prince.
118.10: All the nations circled me and in The Name of LORD JEHOVAH I have destroyed them!
118.11: They surrounded me and circled me and in The Name of LORD JEHOVAH I have destroyed them!
118.12: They surrounded me like wasps and were extinguished like a grass fire, and in The Name of LORD JEHOVAH I destroyed them!
118.13: I was cast out that I might be overthrown and fall, and LORD JEHOVAH helped me!
118.14: LORD JEHOVAH is my power and my praise and he has been my Savior!
118.15: The voice of praise and of salvation is in the tent of the righteous. The right hand of LORD JEHOVAH has performed miracles!
118.16: The right hand of LORD JEHOVAH has exalted me! The right hand of LORD JEHOVAH has performed miracles!
118.17: And I shall not die but I shall live, and I shall narrate the works of LORD JEHOVAH!
118.18: The instructor, LORD JEHOVAH, has instructed me, and has not handed me over to death.
118.19: Open to me the gates of righteousness and I shall enter them and praise LORD JEHOVAH.
118.20: This is the gate of LORD JEHOVAH into which the righteous ones enter.
118.21: I shall praise you, for you answered me, and you have been my Savior!
118.22: The stone which the builders rejected, that has become the head of the building.
118.23: This is from the presence of LORD JEHOVAH and it is a wonder in our eyes!
118.24: This is the day that LORD JEHOVAH has made; come, we will leap for joy and rejoice in him!
118.25: Oh, LORD JEHOVAH, save me! LORD JEHOVAH, deliver me!
118.26: Blessed is he who comes in The Name of LORD JEHOVAH! We have blessed you from the House of LORD JEHOVAH!
118.27: LORD JEHOVAH, our God, shine to us and bind our holidays in chains unto the horns of the altar!
118.28: You are my God, I shall confess you. You are my God, I shall praise you!
118.29: Give thanks to LORD JEHOVAH, because he is good, and his grace is to eternity!

119.1: Aleph Blessed are those who are without blemish in the way and they walk in the Torah of LORD JEHOVAH.
119.2: Blessed are those who keep his testimony and seek him with all their heart.
119.3: They have not done evil and they have walked in his ways.
119.4: You have commanded us to keep your commandments excellently!
119.5: But, oh, that my ways were fashioned that I would keep your commandments!
119.6: And I would not be ashamed when I have kept all your commandments.
119.7: I shall praise you in the integrity of my heart when I have learned the judgments of your righteousness.
119.8: I have kept your commandments, do not leave me for eternity!
119.9: Beth With what does a boy purify his way to keep your commandments?
119.10: With all my heart I have sought you; do not lead me astray from your commandments.
119.11: I have hidden your words in my heart that I shall not sin against you.
119.12: You are blessed LORD JEHOVAH; teach me your commandments!
119.13: With my lips I have rehearsed all the judgments of your righteousness.
119.14: I have loved the way of your testimonies more than all riches!
119.15: I have meditated in your commandments and I have known your ways.
119.16: I meditated in your Law that I would not forget your words.
119.17: Gimel Answer your Servant that I may live and keep your words.
119.18: Open my eyes that I may see the wonders that are in your Law.
119.19: I am an inhabitant with you; do not hide your commandments from me.
119.20: My soul has desired and has lusted for your judgments at all times!
119.21: You rebuked the nations and those that stray from your commandments are cursed.
119.22: Take reproach from me because I have kept your testimonies.
119.23: The evil have been sitting and plotting against me, but I have been meditating upon your commandments.
119.24: I have meditated upon your testimonies and your good counsel.
119.25: Daleth My soul has cleaved to the dust; give me life according to your word.
119.26: I have shown you my ways and you have answered me; teach me your Law.
119.27: Show me the way of your commandments and I shall meditate on your wonders.
119.28: My soul is troubled in thought; give me life according to your word.
119.29: Take the way of the evil from me and teach me your law.
119.30: I have chosen the way of your faithfulness and I have desired your judgments.
119.31: I have cleaved to your testimonies, LORD JEHOVAH; do not put me to shame.
119.32: I have walked in the way of your commandments because you have gladdened me!
119.33: He Teach me, LORD JEHOVAH, the way of your commandments, and I shall keep them.
119.34: Give me understanding that I would keep your Law and I shall keep it with my whole heart.
119.35: Walk me in the path of your commandments because I am delighted in it.
119.36: Turn my heart to your testimonies and not to fables.
119.37: Turn away my eyes that they will not see falsehood and give me life in your way.
119.38: Confirm your word to your Servant, who is in awe of you.
119.39: Take reproach from me, because your judgments are excellent!
119.40: I have desired your commandments and, in your righteousness, give me life.
119.41: Waw Your mercies will come upon me, LORD JEHOVAH, and your salvation which you have spoken.
119.42: And I shall give answer to him who reproaches me because I have trusted upon your word.
119.43: The word of truth will not cease from my mouth because I have waited for your judgments.
119.44: I shall keep your law to the eternity of eternities!
119.45: And I shall walk in an open expanse because I have desired your commandments.
119.46: I shall speak in righteousness in front of Kings and I shall not be ashamed!
119.47: I shall meditate upon your commandments which I have loved,
119.48: I shall lift my hands to your commandments which I have loved; I shall meditate in your commandments and I shall be glorified in your faith!
119.49: Zayin Remember your word to your Servant, in which I have trusted.
119.50: By it I have been comforted in my affliction, because your word has given me life!
119.51: The evil have afflicted me and I have not turned aside from your Law.
119.52: I remembered your judgments, LORD JEHOVAH, which are from eternity, and I have been comforted and they have been for my instruction.
119.53: Sadness has seized me, from sinners who have forsaken your law.
119.54: Your commandments have been my song in the house of my pilgrimage.
119.55: I have remembered your Name in the night, LORD JEHOVAH, and I have kept your Law
119.56: And I am comforted because I have kept your commandments.
119.57: Kheth In the volume of LORD JEHOVAH I have meditated that I would keep your commandments.
119.58: I have waited for your face with my whole heart! Give me life according to your word!
119.59: I considered my ways and I turned my feet to your steps.
119.60: I prepared and I did not delay that I would keep your commandments.
119.61: The cords of the evil entangled me and I have not turned aside from your Law.
119.62: I stood at midnight to thank you for your righteous judgments!
119.63: I am a friend of all your worshipers and of those who keep your commandments.
119.64: Your mercies, LORD JEHOVAH, fill the earth; teach me your commandments.
119.65: Teth Do good with your Servant, LORD JEHOVAH, as you have said.
119.66: Teach me experience favor and knowledge because I have believed in your commandments.
119.67: Before I had been humbled, I believed, and I have kept your word.
119.68: You are good, LORD JEHOVAH, and you do good! Teach me your commandments.
119.69: The evil of the proud is multiplied and I have kept your commandments with all my heart.
119.70: Their heart is curdled like milk and I have kept your Law.
119.71: It is good for me that I have been humbled that I may learn your commandments.
119.72: The Law of your mouth is better to me than thousands of gold and silver!
119.73: Yodh Your hands have made me and have restored me; teach me your Law.
119.74: For your worshipers will see and they will rejoice and they shall know that I have hoped for your word.
119.75: I have known that your judgments are right, LORD JEHOVAH, and your faithfulness has humbled me!
119.76: Your mercies shall be for my comfort, as you have said to your Servant
119.77: Let your mercies come upon me and I shall live because I have been taught in your Law.
119.78: Let the evil shall be ashamed, for by evil they humbled me, and I have meditated in your commandments.
119.79: Your worshipers will turn to me, and those who know your testimonies.
119.80: My heart will meditate in your commandments and I shall not be ashamed!
119.81: Kaph My soul has lusted for your salvation and I have hoped for your word.
119.82: My eyes look for your word. When will you comfort me?
119.83: Because I have been like a wine skin in a frost, and your commandments I have not forgotten.
119.84: How many are the days of your Servant, and when will you perform the justice of my persecutors for me?
119.85: The evil, who are not of your Law, have dug a ditch for me.
119.86: All your commandments are faithful, and the evil persecute me.
119.87: In a bit they would have destroyed me in the earth, and I have not forsaken your commandments.
119.88: Give me life according to your kindnesses that I may keep the testimony of your mouth.
119.89: Lamed You are to eternity, LORD JEHOVAH, and your word stands in Heaven.
119.90: Your faithfulness is for a generation of generations; you fashioned the Earth and established it.
119.92: If your law had not been my meditation, I would have perished in my affliction.
119.93: I shall never forget your commandments because my life is in them.
119.94: I am yours; save me, because I have kept your commandments.
119.95: The evil lay wait for me to destroy me and I have understood your testimonies.
119.96: I have seen the end of all things, the very end, and your commandment is greatly enlarged!
119.97: Mem How I have loved your Law, and it is my meditation the whole day!
119.98: Make me wiser than my enemies because I have kept your commandments.
119.99: Educate me more than all my teachers because your testimonies have been my meditation.
119.100: I understand more than The Elders because I have kept your commandments.
119.101: I have restrained my feet from every evil way that I may keep your commandments.
119.102: I have not departed from your judgments because you have taught me.
119.103: Your words are sweet to the roof of my palate, better than honey to my mouth!
119.104: I have meditated in your commandments; therefore I have hated every evil way.
119.105: Nun Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.
119.106: I have sworn and I have been steadfast that I would keep the judgments of your righteousness.
119.107: I have been greatly humbled, LORD JEHOVAH; give me life according to your word.
119.108: Be pleased with the words of my mouth, LORD JEHOVAH, and teach me of your judgments.
119.109: My soul is in your hands always and I have not forgotten your Law.
119.110: Sinners have set snares for me and I have not departed from your commandments.
119.111: I have inherited your testimonies for eternity, therefore my heart has gladness.
119.112: I have inclined my heart to do your commandments for eternity in truth!
119.113: Samekh I have hated the evil ones and I have loved your Law!
119.114: You are my shelter and the house of my refuge and I have hoped for your word.
119.115: Depart from me, you evil ones, that I may keep the commandments of my God!
119.116: Lead me in your word and I shall live and you will not disappoint me of my hope.
119.117: Help me and I shall be saved and I shall always be taught in your commandments.
119.118: You have rejected all who stray from you because their meditation is evil.
119.119: Sustain me and I shall be saved and I shall meditate always in your commandments.
119.120: Order my flesh by your awe and I am in awe of your judgments.
119.121: Ayin Do judgment and righteousness; do not leave me in the hand of my oppressors.
119.122: Delight your Servant in goodness and do not let the proud slander me.
119.123: My eyes look for your salvation and the word of your righteousness.
119.124: Do for your Servant according to your mercies and teach me your Law.
119.125: I am your Servant; give me understanding and I shall know your testimonies.
119.126: It is time to serve LORD JEHOVAH, and now they have canceled your Law.
119.127: Because of this, I have loved your commandments more than gold and more than precious stones.
119.128: I have loved all your commandments and I have hated all the ways of the evil.
119.129: Pe Great are your testimonies, therefore my soul has kept them.
119.130: Open your word and shine and give understanding to young children.
119.131: I opened my mouth and I inhaled The Spirit, and I have awaited your salvation.
119.132: Return to me and show mercy upon me because I have loved your Name.
119.133: Prepare my goings in your paths and do not let evil rule over me.
119.134: Save me from the injustice of man that I may keep your commandments.
119.135: Shine your face upon your Servant and teach me your Law.
119.136: Streams of water ran from my eyes because they do not keep your Law.
119.137: Tsadhe You are righteous, LORD JEHOVAH, and your legal judgments are very upright.
119.138: You commanded your testimonies in righteousness and in faithfulness.
119.139: Zeal has tormented me always because your enemies have forgotten your word.
119.140: Your word is very precious and your Servant has loved it.
119.141: I am small and despised and I have not forgotten your commandments.
119.142: Your righteousness stands to eternity, and your Law in the truth.
119.143: Affliction and trouble have befallen me and I have meditated in your commandments.
119.144: Your testimony is righteous to eternity; educate me and I shall live.
119.145: Qoph I called upon you from my whole heart, LORD JEHOVAH; answer me and I shall keep your commandments!
119.146: I have called upon you; save me and I shall keep your testimonies.
119.147: I preceded the dawn and I cried and waited for your word.
119.148: My eyes are open before the night watch that I shall meditate in your word.
119.149: Hear my voice, LORD JEHOVAH, according to your mercies, and I shall live in your judgments.
119.150: My evil persecutors have come near and they are far from your Law.
119.151: You are near, LORD JEHOVAH, and all your commandments are in the truth.
119.152: I have known your testimony from the first because you have established it from eternity.
119.153: Resh See my affliction and save me because I have not forgotten your Law.
119.154: Judge my case and save me and give me life in your word.
119.155: Salvation is far from the evil ones because they have not sought your commandments.
119.156: Many are your mercies, LORD JEHOVAH, and in your judgment give me life.
119.157: My persecutors and my enemies have increased and I have not departed from your testimonies.
119.158: I have seen the evil ones and I have known that they have not kept your word.
119.159: See that I have loved your commandments, LORD JEHOVAH, and give me life in your kindness.
119.160: The origin of your word is the truth and all the judgments of your righteousness are for eternity.
119.161: Shin Princes pursue me for nothing and my heart is in awe of your word.
119.162: I am gladdened by your word like he that finds much loot.
119.163: I have hated and despised evil and I have loved your Law.
119.164: Seven times in a day I have praised you for your righteous judgments.
119.165: Great is the peace of those who love your Law and they have no sickness.
119.166: I have hoped for your salvation, LORD JEHOVAH, and I have done your commandments.
119.167: My soul has kept your testimony and I have loved it greatly.
119.168: I have kept your commandments and your testimonies and all my ways are before you.
119.169: Tau My praise will enter before you, LORD JEHOVAH; give me life in your word!
119.170: My prayer will enter before you, LORD JEHOVAH; save me in your word!
119.171: My tongue will request your word because all your commandments are in righteousness.
119.172: My lips will speak your praises when you teach me your commandments.
119.173: Your hand will help me because I have desired your commandments.
119.174: My soul has waited for your salvation and I have meditated in your Law.
119.175: My soul shall live, and your glory and your judgment will help me.
119.176: I have strayed like a lost sheep. Seek your Servant, because I have not forgotten your commandments.

120.1: To LORD JEHOVAH in my suffering I cried, and he answered me!
120.2: And, LORD JEHOVAH, save my soul from the lips of the evil and from the deceitful tongue!
120.3: What will we give to you and what will we add to you, deceitful tongue?
120.4: The arrows of a mighty man are sharp, like burning coals of oak.
120.5: Woe to me, for my pilgrimage is long and I have dwelt in a tent of Qedar!
120.6: My soul has long dwelt with those who hate peace.
120.7: And I have spoken peace and they have been fighting with me.

121.1: I shall lift my eyes to the hills; from where will come my helper?
121.2: My help is from LORD JEHOVAH, he who made Heaven and Earth!
121.3: He will not give your foot to shaking neither will he slumber; he will keep you.
121.4: For the keeper of Israel neither slumbers nor sleeps.
121.5: LORD JEHOVAH is your keeper and LORD JEHOVAH will put you in his right hand.
121.6: The sun will not smite you by day, neither the moon by night.
121.7: LORD JEHOVAH will keep you from all evils; he will keep your soul.
121.8: LORD JEHOVAH will preserve your going out and your coming in from now and unto eternity.

122.1: I was gladdened when they said to me, "We are going to the house of LORD JEHOVAH"!
122.2: My feet had been standing inside your gates, oh, Jerusalem!
122.3: Jerusalem is a building like a city surrounded with a wall.
122.4: There went up the tribes, the tribes of LORD JEHOVAH, a testimony to Israel.
122.5: Because there they set up thrones for judgment, to thank The Name of LORD JEHOVAH, the thrones of the house of David.
122.6: Invoke the peace of Jerusalem; your friends shall be prosperous.
122.7: Let there be peace by your power and prosperity within your walls.
122.8: Because of my brothers and my friends I shall pronounce peace upon you.
122.9: For the sake of the house of LORD JEHOVAH, our God, I shall seek for your good.

123.1: To you I have lifted up my eyes, oh Dweller of Heaven!
123.2: Like the eyes of Servants to their Masters and like the eyes of a Handmaiden to her Mistress, so our eyes are to you, LORD JEHOVAH, our God, until you have mercy upon us!
123.3: Show mercy upon us, LORD JEHOVAH, show mercy upon us, because of the multitude of the contempt which we have heard!
123.4: For the multitude has filled our soul with the mockery of mockers and the contempt of the proud.

124.1: If it was not LORD JEHOVAH who had stood for us, Israel shall say,
124.2: For if it was not LORD JEHOVAH who stood for us when the children of men stood up against us,
124.3: They would have swallowed us alive, and when their rage was provoked upon us,
124.4: The waters would have overwhelmed us; the stream would have passed over our soul.
124.5: And many waters passed over our soul!
124.6: Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH who has not given us as food for their teeth!
124.7: Our soul is like a sparrow escaped from a snare of prey; the snare was broken and we were delivered!
124.8: And our help is in The Name of LORD JEHOVAH, he who made Heaven and Earth!

125.1: Those who hope in LORD JEHOVAH, in the mountain of Zion, will not be moved, but will dwell for eternity.
125.2: Jerusalem, the mountains surround her, and LORD JEHOVAH surrounds his people from now and unto eternity!
125.3: For the scepter of evil will not rest on the portion of the righteous ones, neither will the righteous reach their hands into evil.
125.4: Do good, LORD JEHOVAH, to the good, those who are right in their heart.
125.5: And those who pervert their paths, LORD JEHOVAH will lead with the workers of evil. Peace be to Israel!

126.1: When LORD JEHOVAH reverses the captivity of Zion, we will be like those who rejoice!
126.2: Then laughter will fill our mouth and praise will fill our tongue! Then they will say in the place of the Gentiles, "LORD JEHOVAH works with these greatly"!
126.3: LORD JEHOVAH works greatly for us, and we are in joy!
126.4: Return our captivity, LORD JEHOVAH, like the streams in the South.
126.5: Those who sow in tears will reap in joy!
126.6: One that keeps walking and weeping, while carrying seed, is going to come in joy, carrying sheaves.

127.1: If LORD JEHOVAH does not build the house, its builders labor uselessly, and if LORD JEHOVAH does not keep the city, its keepers wake up uselessly.
127.2: Those who will rise early and are late to sit down eating bread, in sorrows, are worthless, so he will give his beloved ones sleep.
127.3: For the inheritance of LORD JEHOVAH is children, the reward of the fruit of the womb.
127.4: Like an arrow in the hand of a warrior, so are the children of the youth.
127.5: Blessed is the man who will fill his quiver with them, and they will not be ashamed when speaking with the enemy in the gate.

128.1: Blessed is everyone who is in awe of LORD JEHOVAH and walks in his steps!
128.2: You are happy, oh man, when you will eat the toil of your hands and it is a blessing to your soul!
128.3: Your wife is like a glorious vine on the outside of your house, your children like plants of olive trees around your table!
128.4: Thus the man will be blessed who is in awe of LORD JEHOVAH!
128.5: LORD JEHOVAH will bless you from Zion and you shall see the good of Jerusalem all the days of your life!
128.6: And you shall see your children's children and peace upon Israel!

129.1: Israel will say, "My torturers have increased from my youth!"
129.2: My torturers have increased from my youth and they have not prevailed over my power.
129.3: The scourgers scourged upon my back and prolonged their affliction.
129.4: LORD JEHOVAH is righteous and cuts off the expectations of the evil ones.
129.5: All the haters of Zion shall turn their backside.
129.6: They shall be like the grass of the rooftop which the wind pulls out and dries up when it blows upon it.
129.7: And the reaper does not fill his palm with it, neither does the sheave binder strip it.
129.8: Neither do those who pass through say, "The blessing of LORD JEHOVAH be upon you; we bless you in The Name of LORD JEHOVAH." Ps

130.1: From the deep I called you, LORD JEHOVAH!
130.2: And you heard my voice; your ears will be listening to us, to the voice of my supplication.
130.3: If you keep sins, LORD JEHOVAH, who is able to stand?
130.4: Because from your presence is forgiveness.
130.5: I have hoped in LORD JEHOVAH and my soul has waited for his word.
130.6: I have waited for LORD JEHOVAH from the watch of dawn and unto the watch of the morning.
130.7: Let Israel expect LORD JEHOVAH because from his presence are compassions and great salvation is with him.
130.8: And he will save Israel from all his evil.

131.1: LORD JEHOVAH, my heart is not lifted up, neither are my eyes lifted up, neither have I walked in a pretense of things greater than I.
131.2: But my soul is humbled like one weaned of his mother, and my soul is like one weaned of me.
131.3: But let Israel hope in LORD JEHOVAH from now and unto eternity.

132.1: LORD JEHOVAH, remember David and all his affliction!
132.2: For he swore to LORD JEHOVAH and vowed to the God of Jacob:
132.3: I shall not enter to the roof of my house; I shall not ascend to the mattress of my bed,
132.4: I shall not give sleep to my eyes, neither slumber to my eyebrows
132.5: Until I find a place for LORD JEHOVAH and a tent for the God of Jacob.
132.6: Behold, we heard it in Ephrata and we found it in the fields.
132.7: We shall enter his tabernacle and we shall worship at the stool of his feet.
132.8: Arise, LORD JEHOVAH, to your rest, you and the ark of your might!
132.9: Your priests will wear righteousness and your righteous ones, glory.
132.10: Because of David your Servant, do not turn away the face of your Anointed.
132.11: LORD JEHOVAH has sworn to David in truth and he will not turn from it: "One from the fruits of your loins I shall set upon your throne.”
132.12: If your sons will keep my covenant: this testimony that I teach them, some also of their children will dwell to the eternity of eternities upon your throne
132.13: Because LORD JEHOVAH is pleased in Zion and he chose it a dwelling place.
132.14: This is my rest to an eternity of eternities; here I shall sit because I desired it.
132.15: And I shall bless her game and her poor ones I shall satisfy with bread.
132.16: I shall clothe her priests with salvation and her righteous ones in glory.
132.17: There I shall make the trumpet of David shine and I will shine a lamp for his Anointed.
132.18: And I shall clothe his enemies in shame, and upon him my holiness will flourish.

133.1: How good and how beautiful for brothers when they dwell as one
133.2: It is like oil that descends upon the head and upon the beard, the beard of Aaron, that descends upon the collar of his garment
133.3: Like the dew of Hermon that descends upon the mountain of Zion, because there LORD JEHOVAH commanded the blessing and the Life unto eternity.

134.1: Bless LORD JEHOVAH, all you Servants of LORD JEHOVAH, those who stand in his house and in the courts of the house of LORD JEHOVAH at night.
134.2: Lift up your hands unto Holiness and bless LORD JEHOVAH!
134.3: LORD JEHOVAH will bless you from Zion, he who made Heaven and Earth!

135.1: Praise the Name of LORD JEHOVAH, praise, oh Servants of LORD JEHOVAH!
135.2: Those who stand in the house of LORD JEHOVAH and in the courts of the house of our God.
135.3: Praise LORD JEHOVAH because he is good; sing to his Name because it is sweet!
135.4: Because LORD JEHOVAH has chosen Jacob for himself and Israel for his congregation!
135.5: Because I know that LORD JEHOVAH, our Lord, is greater than all gods!
135.6: And all that LORD JEHOVAH pleases, he does in Heaven and in Earth and in the seas and in all the depths!
135.7: He brings up clouds from the ends of the Earth and he made lightnings for the rain; he will bring forth the winds from storehouses!
135.8: For he struck the firstborn ones of Egypt, from the children of men and unto the animals.
135.9: He sent his signs and his wonders within mighty Egypt upon Pharaoh and upon all his Servants
135.10: He who struck many peoples and killed Kings.
135.11: Sihon, King of the Amorites and Og, King of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan.
135.12: He gave their land as an inheritance to Israel his people.
135.13: LORD JEHOVAH, your Name is to eternity; LORD JEHOVAH, your remembrance is for a generation of generations.
135.14: Because LORD JEHOVAH judges his people and he is comforted in his Servants.
135.15: The idols of the Gentiles are silver and gold, the work of the hands of man.
135.16: They have mouths and they do not speak; they have eyes and they do not see.
135.17: They have ears and they do not hear, neither is there breath in their mouths.
135.18: Their makers shall be like them and all who trust upon them.
135.19: House of Israel, bless LORD JEHOVAH! House of Aaron, bless LORD JEHOVAH!
135.20: House of Levi, bless LORD JEHOVAH! Worshipers of LORD JEHOVAH, bless LORD JEHOVAH!
135.21: Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH from Zion, he who dwells in Jerusalem!

136.1: Give thanks to LORD JEHOVAH, because he is good, and his mercies are to eternity.
136.2: Give thanks to the God of gods, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.3: Give thanks to Lord of Dominions, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.4: To him who alone does great wonders, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.5: To him who made the Heavens in his wisdom, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.6: To him who spread out the earth upon the waters, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.7: To him who made great lights, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.8: The sun for a ruler of the day, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.9: The moon and the stars for rulers of the night, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.10: To him who struck the firstborn of Egypt, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.11: For he brought out Israel from the midst of them, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.12: With a strong hand and with a high arm, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.13: To him who divided The Sea of Reeds, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.14: And he made Israel pass into it, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.15: To him who struck Pharaoh and his army in The Sea of Reeds, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.16: To him who led his people in the desert, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.17: To him who struck great Kings, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.18: And he killed mighty Kings, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.19: Sihon, King of the Amorites, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.20: And Og, King of Bashan, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.21: For he gave their lands as an inheritance, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.22: An inheritance to Israel his Servant, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.23: To him who remembered us in our humiliation, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.24: And he saved us from our enemies, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.25: To him who gives food to all flesh, for his mercies are to eternity.
136.26: Give thanks to God who is in Heaven, for his mercies are to eternity.

137.1: By the rivers of Babel, there we sat and we wept, when we remembered Zion.
137.2: Upon the willows within it we hung our harps.
137.3: Because there they asked and they wanted the words of songs, and those leading us said to us, "Sing to us of the songs of Zion.”
137.4: How will we sing to you the praises of LORD JEHOVAH in a foreign land?
137.5: If I forget you, oh, Jerusalem, let my right hand forget me!
137.6: And let my tongue cleave to the roof of my palate, unless I remember you, unless I shall go up to Jerusalem, my chief joy!
137.7: LORD JEHOVAH has remembered the children of Edom in the day of Jerusalem, when they said, "Lay bare, lay bare unto its foundations"!
137.8: Daughter of Babel, destroyer, Blessed is he who will pay you the reward which you have paid us!
137.9: Blessed is he who will seize your infants and will dash the rocks!

138.1: I shall confess you, LORD JEHOVAH, from my whole heart; in front of Kings I shall sing praise to you!
138.2: I shall worship in the temple of your holiness and I shall give thanks to your Name for your kindness and for your truth, because you have extolled your Word above every name!
138.3: In the day that I called you, you answered me, and you have increased the strength of my soul.
138.4: All the Kings of the Earth shall confess to you, LORD JEHOVAH, because they have heard the speech of your mouth!
138.5: And they will praise the way of LORD JEHOVAH, because the honor of LORD JEHOVAH is great!
138.6: And high is LORD JEHOVAH who sees in the deep, and he who is exalted knows from afar off!
138.7: If I walk in trouble, you will save me! In the anger of my enemies you will reach your hand and your right hand will save me!
138.8: LORD JEHOVAH, abide upon me! LORD JEHOVAH, your mercies are to eternity and you will not desert the work of your hands!

139.1: LORD JEHOVAH, you have searched me and you have known me.
139.2: You know my sitting and my rising; you have understood my reasonings from the high place.
139.3: You know my way and my steps and you have investigated all my ways.
139.4: If there is an alteration in my language, you, LORD JEHOVAH, know all these things.
139.5: For from the beginning to the end you have formed me, and you have set your hand upon me.
139.6: The knowledge and the wonder are stronger than I and I could not master them.
139.7: Where shall I go from your Spirit and where shall I hide from before you?
139.8: If I shall ascend to Heaven, there you are, and if I would descend to Sheol, you are there also!
139.9: If I shall lift my wings like an Eagle's and dwell at the end of the Sea
139.10: There also your hand will hold me and your right hand will lead me.
139.11: You have said, "The darkness will shine to me and the night will shine upon my face."
139.12: And the darkness will not darken from you, the night will shine like the day and the darkness as the light.
139.13: Because you have prepared my kidneys and you have carried me from the womb of my mother.
139.14: I shall give thanks to you because of the wonders that you have done, for your works are exalted and my soul knows it well.
139.15: And my bones were not hidden from you; when I was made in secret, I went down to the lower parts of the earth.
139.16: And my eyes saw my germination upon your Scriptures; all these things were written; behold, the days were cut short, and there was no person in them.
139.17: But your friends are very precious to me, oh, God, and they have strengthened their rulers greatly.
139.18: I shall count them and they will be multiplied more than the sand; I awoke and again I am with you!
139.19: Surely you will kill the sinners, oh God, and men of blood will pass from me!
139.20: Because they have spoken against you and they have taken your city without a cause!
139.21: I hate those who hate you, LORD JEHOVAH, and I am enraged against those who stand against you!
139.22: I have hated them with a complete hatred and they are enemies to me.
139.23: Search me, oh God, and know my heart, and prove me and know my steps
139.24: And see if there is a way of lies in me; lead me in your eternal way!

140.1: Save me, LORD JEHOVAH, from the evil man, and keep me from evil men.
140.2: For they have conceived evil in their heart and they have provoked disputes all day
140.3: Who have sharpened their tongues like a snake and the venom of an asp is under their lips.
140.4: Keep me, LORD JEHOVAH, from the hand of the evil, and keep me from men who are extortionists, who have schemed to overthrow my steps.
140.5: And the proud have hidden snares for me and they spread the cords of their nets upon my path and cast nets over me!
140.6: I said to LORD JEHOVAH, "You are my God! Give ear to the voice of my prayer!"
140.7: LORD JEHOVAH, my mighty Savior! The shelter of my head in the day of war!
140.8: LORD JEHOVAH, do not grant the lust of the evil man and do not exalt his plot for my head.
140.9: The evil of their lips will cover them.
140.10: And coals will come down upon them and they will fall into fire and they will not be able to rise.
140.11: A talkative man will not be established in the earth and evil will hunt the evil man to destruction.
140.12: I know that LORD JEHOVAH performs the judgment of the poor and the judgment of the afflicted.
140.13: But the righteous shall confess your Name and the upright will dwell in front of your face.

141.1: LORD JEHOVAH, I have called you; answer me, give ear and accept my words.
141.2: My prayer came before you like incense, and an offering of my hands like the evening offering.
141.3: LORD JEHOVAH, set a guard at my mouth and a guard for my lips
141.4: That my heart would not turn aside to an evil word or do evil works with wicked men. I shall not eat salt with them.
141.5: The Righteous One will teach me and will rebuke me; the oil of the wicked will not anoint my head because my prayer is against their evil companions.
141.6: And their Judges were restrained by the hand of The Stone, and they heard my words, for they are sweet.
141.7: Like a plowshare tears open the Earth, their bones are scattered over the mouth of Sheol.
141.8: And I have lifted my eyes up to you, LORD JEHOVAH, and I have trusted upon you; do not cast out my soul.
141.9: Keep me from the hand of the boastful, for they have hidden snares for me.
141.10: The evil will fall as one into their nets as I pass by.

142.1: With my voice to LORD JEHOVAH I cried; with my voice to LORD JEHOVAH I made supplication.
142.2: And I poured before him my supplication and have shown before him my affliction.
142.3: When my spirit was troubled, you knew my path; in the way of my steps they have hidden snares for me.
142.4: I looked to the right and I saw there was none to advise me; a place of refuge was lost to me and there was no avenger for my soul.
142.5: I cried to you, LORD JEHOVAH, and I have said:" You are my hope and my portion in the land of life."
142.6: Give ear to my request because I have been very humbled; save me from my persecutors, because they are stronger than I.
142.7: Bring my soul out from prison, for I shall praise your Name and your righteous ones will wait for me when you reward me.

143.1: Hear my prayer, LORD JEHOVAH, and give ear to my request; answer me in your speech and in your righteousness.
143.2: Do not bring your Servant to judgment, because no one who lives is innocent before you.
143.3: Because the enemy pursues my soul and he has humbled my life in the Earth and made me to dwell in darkness like the dead for eternity.
143.4: My spirit is troubled against me and my heart is moved within me.
143.5: And I have remembered you, LORD JEHOVAH, from the first, and I have meditated on all your works and have meditated on the work of your hands.
143.6: And I have stretched forth my hands to you; my soul is thirsty for you like the ground.
143.7: Answer me quickly, LORD JEHOVAH, because my spirit is spent; do not turn your face from me, lest I be handed over with the descenders to the pit.
143.8: Make me hear your kindness at dawn, because I trust upon you; show me your road that I may go in it, because to you, LORD JEHOVAH, I have lifted up my soul.
143.10: And teach me to do your pleasure, because you are my God; your Spirit is sweet; you will lead me in the way of life.
143.11: Because of your Name, LORD JEHOVAH, comfort me, and because of your righteousness, bring my soul out from trouble.
143.12: In your kindness, stop those who hate me, and destroy the enemies of my soul, because I am your Servant!

144.1: Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH who teaches my hands for war and my fingers for battle!
144.2: The house of my refuge and my deliverer, my helper, upon whom I trust and he subdues the people under me!
144.3: LORD JEHOVAH, what is a son of man that you know him, and a son of man that you think much of him?
144.4: A son of man is like a vapor and his days pass away like smoke.
144.5: Bend Heaven, LORD JEHOVAH, and come down, and severely rebuke the mountains and they will be reduced to smoke!
144.6: Cause your lightnings to flash and trouble them; send your arrows and scatter them.
144.7: Reach your hand from the high place and draw me out of many waters and from the hand of the evil ones!
144.8: For their mouths speak emptiness and their right hand is the right hand of evil.
144.9: Oh God, I shall sing a new song to you, and with a harp of ten strings I shall sing praise to you!
144.10: For he gave salvation to the King and he delivered David his Servant from the sword of evil.
144.11: Save me from the hand of the evil whose mouths speak futility and their right hand is the right hand of evil.
144.12: Our sons are like plants that grow from their youth and our daughters like brides adorned in the likeness of temples.
144.13: Our garners are full and overflowing, each one. Our sheep bear young and increase in our marketplaces.
144.14: Our herds increase and there is none sterile among them; there is no ruin neither outcry in our streets!
144.15: Blessed is the people that is so. Blessed is the people whose God is LORD JEHOVAH!

145.1: I shall exalt you, my Lord, the King, and I shall bless your Name for an eternity of eternities!
145.2: Every day I shall bless you and I shall glorify your name for an eternity of eternities!
145.3: Great is our Lord and very glorious and there is no end to his greatness!
145.4: Generation to generation they will tell your works and they will show your heroism!
145.5: And they will relate the might of your awesomeness and they will tell your greatness.
145.6: And they will speak the awesomeness of your might and I shall tell your greatness.
145.7: Your righteous ones will seek the remembrance of your many favors and they will find.
145.8: LORD JEHOVAH is merciful and cherishing; he is patient and his grace is abundant.
145.9: LORD JEHOVAH is good and his mercies are upon all his works.
145.10: LORD JEHOVAH, your Servants shall give thanks to you and your righteous ones shall praise you!
145.11: They will tell the glory of your kingdom and they will speak by your might
145.12: To show the sons of men your heroism in the glory of your kingdom.
145.13: Your Kingdom is a Kingdom of all the ages and your authority is unto all generations of generations. LORD JEHOVAH is faithful in his words and righteous in all his works.*
145.14: LORD JEHOVAH sustains all who fall and he straightens all who are stooped.
145.15: The eyes of everyone are raised to you; you give them food in their times.
145.16: You open your hand and satisfy the desire of everyone who lives.
145.17: LORD JEHOVAH is righteous in all his ways and compassionate in all his works.
145.18: LORD JEHOVAH is near to those who call to him in truth.
145.19: And he performs the desire of his worshipers; he hears their prayer and saves them.
145.20: LORD JEHOVAH keeps all his worshipers and all the evil ones he destroys.
145.21: I shall speak the praises of LORD JEHOVAH with my mouth and all the children of flesh will bless The Name of his Holiness to an eternity of eternities.

146.2: I shall glorify LORD JEHOVAH with my life and I shall sing praise my God while I endure.
146.3: Do not trust a prince or upon a son of man, for there is no salvation in his hand.
146.4: For his spirit goes out and he returns to his earth and in that day all his thoughts are destroyed.
146.5: Blessed is he whose help is in the God of Jacob and his hope is upon LORD JEHOVAH his God
146.6: He who made Heaven and Earth and the seas and all that is in them; he keeps truth for eternity.
146.7: And he executes judgment for the oppressed, he gives bread to the hungry; LORD JEHOVAH releases prisoners.
146.8: LORD JEHOVAH opens the blind eyes. LORD JEHOVAH straightens the stooped ones. LORD JEHOVAH loves the righteous.
146.9: LORD JEHOVAH also keeps the poor; he nourishes the orphans and the widows and he drowns the way of the evil.
146.10: LORD JEHOVAH reigns to eternity and your God, oh, Zion, for a generation of generations!

147.1: It is good to sing to our God, and sweet, and praise is fitting for him.
147.2: LORD JEHOVAH built Jerusalem and the scattered ones of Israel he gathered.
147.3: He heals the broken hearts and binds up their sorrows.
147.4: He counts the number of the stars and he calls all of them by names.
147.5: Great is our Lord and he is strong in his power and there is no end to his understanding.
147.6: LORD JEHOVAH raises the poor and humbles the evil unto the dirt.
147.7: Praise LORD JEHOVAH with glory; sing to LORD JEHOVAH with harps
147.8: Who hides Heaven with clouds; he gives rain upon the Earth and he makes the grass sprout upon the mountains.
147.9: And he gives food to the beasts and to the young ravens that cry.
147.10: LORD JEHOVAH does not delight in the power of a horse, neither delights in the legs of a mighty man.
147.11: But LORD JEHOVAH delights in his worshipers and those who expect his grace.
147.12: Praise LORD JEHOVAH, oh, Jerusalem; praise your God, oh, Zion!
147.13: Because he has strengthened the bars of your gates and blessed your sons within you.
147.14: He established your borders in peace and he satisfied you with the fatness of wheat.
147.15: He sends his word upon Earth and his answer runs quickly.
147.16: He gives snow like wool and he scatters frost like ashes.
147.17: He casts ice like morsels; who can stand before his cold?
147.18: He sends his word and melts them; he makes the winds blow and the waters flow.
147.19: He shows his word in Jacob, his laws and his commandments in Israel.
147.20: He has not done so for all the nations, neither has he shown them his judgments.

148.1: Praise LORD JEHOVAH from Heaven; praise him in high places!
148.2: Praise him, all his angels! Praise him all his hosts!
148.3: Praise him, Sun and Moon! Praise him, all stars and lights!
148.4: Praise him, Heaven of Heavens; The waters higher than the Heavens!
148.5: Let them praise The Name of LORD JEHOVAH because he spoke and they existed; he commanded and they were created!
148.6: He established them for an eternity of eternities. He gave the law and it does not pass.
148.7: Praise LORD JEHOVAH from the Earth, dragons and all the depths!
148.8: Fire and hail stones and snow and ice, wind and hurricanes, Servants of his word!
148.9: The mountains and all these hills, trees of fruit and all cedars!
148.10: Animals and all cattle creeping things and flying things and birds!
148.11: Kings of the earth and all peoples, Princes and all Judges of the earth!
148.12: Boys and virgins, old men and young men,
148.13: Let them praise The Name of LORD JEHOVAH, because his Name alone is great; his glory is in the earth and in the Heavens!
148.14: He raises the trumpet of his people in praise to all his righteous ones, and to the children of Israel, a people that is near to him.

149.1: Sing to LORD JEHOVAH a new song, his glory in the congregation of the righteous!
149.2: Let Israel rejoice in his Maker and let the children of Zion rejoice in their King!
149.3: And they will praise his Name with tambourines and with timbrels and with harps; let them sing to him!
149.4: Because LORD JEHOVAH is pleased with his people and he gives salvation to the poor.
149.5: Let the righteous ones be strengthened in honor and they will praise him upon their beds.
149.6: They will exalt God in their throats with a dual edged sword in their hands
149.7: To exact vengeance from the Gentiles and reproof from the peoples
149.8: To bind their kings in shackles and their honorable ones in chains of iron
149.9: To do for them the judgment that is written. Glory to all his righteous ones!

150.1: Praise LORD JEHOVAH in his Holiness! Praise him in the firmament of his strength!
150.2: Praise him in his power! Praise him in the multitude of his greatness!
150.3: Praise him with the sound of the horn; praise him with harps and with lyres.
150.4: Praise him with tambourines and with timbrels; praise him with sweet strings.
150.5: Praise him with loud cymbals; praise him with voice and with shouting!
